headline: A Look At Tractor Supply’s Valuation As Piper Sandler Downgrade Highlights Cost And Margin Pressures
summary: Downgrade puts Tractor Supply under closer investor scrutiny Piper Sandler’s downgrade of Tractor Supply (TSCO), tied to weaker companion animal trends and higher pet ownership costs, has sharpened investor focus on how these structural pressures interact with oil and freight related margin concerns. See our latest analysis for Tractor Supply. The recent downgrade and concerns around oil and freight costs come after a sharp reset in sentiment, with a 30 day share price return of 25.42%...
